privileged_info_summary: The Floreant POS 1.4 build 1707b default database contains a pre-existing 'US' tax at 6.0% rate and menu items categorized as 'BEER & WINE' (at least 2 items) and 'RETAIL'. The task requires creating three new tax rates: FOOD TAX at 5.5%, ALCOHOL TAX at 9.0%, and RETAIL TAX at 7.25%. Menu items in the BEER & WINE category must be reassigned to use the ALCOHOL TAX rate, and RETAIL category items must be reassigned to the RETAIL TAX rate. The original US tax must remain unchanged at 6.0%.
